title: Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 9 to 10 - Ministry of Education
content:
## Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 9 to 10
The curriculum guide sets out what your child is learning at secondary school each year and how you and your family can support them to achieve.
- Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 9 to 10
- Year 9 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 10 New Zealand Curriculum
We’re inviting parents and caregivers to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey
This year-by-year learning guide currently covers Years 9 to 10 of the New Zealand Curriculum. We'll be adding more soon.
The guide is structured by year level. Choose your child's level and find ways to understand what they do at school, and how you can support them to achieve what they need to this year.
- Year 9 New Zealand Curriculum Information to help you understand what your child will have learned by the end of their ninth year at school, and ideas on how to support their learning at home. Find out more

### Year 9 New Zealand Curriculum
Information to help you understand what your child will have learned by the end of their ninth year at school, and ideas on how to support their learning at home.
- Year 10 New Zealand Curriculum Information to help you understand what your child will have learned by the end of their tenth year at school, and ideas on how to support their learning at home. Find out more

### Year 10 New Zealand Curriculum
